leagueBriefing: Guadalajara seized the spotlight in Liga MX with a ruthless midweek performance, vaulting to the top of the Clausura 2026 table. The match served as a stark reminder of Chivas' title credentials while deepening the crisis for a struggling León side that finished the night demoralized and shorthanded.

games.headline: Chivas storm to Liga MX summit with five-goal demolition of León
games.brief: Guadalajara put on a clinic at Estadio Akron, dismantling León in a lopsided affair that saw five different players find the back of the net. Chivas dominated from the opening whistle, and once they broke the deadlock, the floodgates opened. A combination of clinical finishing and a León red card turned a competitive fixture into a statement win for the new league leaders.
bullets: The win propels Guadalajara to the top of the Clausura 2026 standings, leapfrogging Cruz Azul.
Five different scorers (Gutiérrez, Sandoval, González, Sepúlveda, and Camberos) contributed to the rout.
León's night went from bad to worse when a VAR-reviewed penalty was followed later by a red card, leaving them to defend with 10 men.
Chivas' defense secured their fifth clean sheet of the campaign, allowing only one shot on target the entire match.
games.context: This victory moves Guadalajara into first place overall in the Clausura 2026, solidifying their status as favorites for the Liguilla.

highlights.title: CHIVAS 5-0 LEÓN | El Rebaño gana, gusta, golea y es líder en juego pendiente | J9 Con México C26
